creator: sonnet@teatime.org
text:
"Boehm, Hans" wrote:
> A more serious problem is that I believe 5.0alpha3 through the
> current releases don't work correctly in leak detection mode. 
> (This has been verified for 5.2.  The offending change was
> introduced in 5.0 alpha3.)
> They generate spurious leak reports.  The easiest work-around is
> probably to build 5.2 with EAGER_SWEEP defined.  This will be
> fixed in the next release.

Fix: 

upgrade port to 5.2 or later.
